section.title: Projects
section.subtitle: Hands-on work across data analytics, automation, and visualization

categories.label: SQL
categories.description: SQL querying, optimization, and analytical problem solving.

project.name: SQL Practice & Problem Solving
project.summary: Comprehensive SQL problem-solving repository covering beginner to advanced queries, joins, subqueries, and optimizations.

projects.problem: Need for structured SQL practice for interviews and real-world analytics.
projects.solution: Solved and documented problems using clean, optimized SQL queries.
projects.impact: Improved query performance understanding and analytical thinking.

categories.label: Python
categories.description: Data analysis and machine learning projects using Python.

project.name: Titanic Survival Prediction
project.summary: End-to-end ML project with EDA, feature engineering, and Random Forest model.

projects.problem: Predict passenger survival using structured data.
projects.solution: Performed data cleaning, EDA, and model training using Python.
projects.impact: Built strong foundation in applied machine learning workflows.

categories.label: Automation
categories.description: Workflow automation and ETL pipelines using JavaScript.

project.name: Email & CSV Automation Pipelines
project.summary: Automated ingestion, filtering, and transformation of CSV data received via email.

projects.problem: Manual handling of recurring CSV reports was inefficient.
projects.solution: Built JavaScript automations to extract, clean, and load data automatically.
projects.impact: Saved hours of manual effort and reduced errors.

project.name: Data-Driven Portfolio Website
project.summary: Personal portfolio built with modular JSON-driven architecture.

projects.solution: Designed a clean HTML/CSS/JS site powered by structured JSON data.
projects.impact: Created a maintainable platform to showcase work.
